nasb.text: He keeps the feet of His godly ones, But the wicked ones are silenced in darkness; For not by might shall a man prevail.

esv.text: “He will guard the feet of his faithful ones, but the wicked shall be cut off in darkness, for not by might shall a man prevail.

cnv.text: 耶和華必保護虔誠人的腳步， 卻使惡人在黑暗中滅亡， 因為人得勝不是靠著力量。

ccb.text: 祂保护祂的圣民， 使恶人在黑暗中灭亡， 因为得胜不是靠人的勇力。
